title: MOMUSE Baby Car Keys Teether Musical Toy, Food Grade Teething Relief Toys for Babies 6 9 12 18 Months, Travel Learn Sensory Toys Gifts for Infant Baby Boys & Girls
features: Soft & Safe Baby Teether: This baby teether toy is made from food grade silicone, BPA free, ASTM and CPSIA approved， small parts tested. It won't break even when tested by an adult pulling hard, super tough and unbreakable. It is the optimal teething relief toy for babies 6-12 months

Multi-Sensory Baby Toys: This baby sensory toy has colorful color keys and multiple texture design. It can stimulate a baby's color perception and tactile development. Our toddler keys are equipped with car simulation sound effects and over 10 types of exquisite music, which also helps the baby's auditory development

Developmental Montessori Games: Baby musical toys have unique key shapes and pressable designs. They're fun for babies while helping them develop their fine motor skills.The simulated car sound of baby music toys gives babies a driving feeling and helps to develop their imagination. It also lets them explore auditory cause and effect

Baby Travel Toy: The bright colours and sounds of the car keys will keep your little one engaged for a long time. It's portable and perfect for taking on your daily outings with the baby, whether in the stroller, car seat or on the plane. Makes parenting easier

Perfect Gifts for Baby Girls & Boys: This baby key teether is an ideal gift for baby's birthday, Easter, or Christmas. After installing 2*AAA batteries (not included), please make sure to tighten the screws on the battery cover. You can also use the teether without batteries if preferred.
description: Product Description Sweet Music 10+ beautiful songs. Baby can play & change music by simply pressing the music button, and pressing other buttons to quickly pause music. Make it easy for your baby to have fun at their fingertips Easy to Clean Wipe the teether key toy with a damp cloth. Do not rinse the entire toy directly in water.
